title: UChicago will offer free tuition for families with incomes below $250,000, greatly expanding undergraduate aid
summary_en: Starting in Autumn 2027, initiative covers tuition, fees, housing and meals for families with incomes below $125,000, dramatically increasing access to a transformative UChicago education
title_cn: UChicago will offer free tuition for families with incomes below $250,000, greatly expanding undergraduate aid

title: New UChicago digital research tool opens paths connecting cultures and continents
summary_en: Maps of Chicago, Guerrilla Television, Middle East photographs, and more are connected with metadata to power research
title_cn: New UChicago digital research tool opens paths connecting cultures and continents

title: UChicago alumni earn Pulitzer Prizes for international and local reporting
summary_en: Journalists Dake Kang, AB’16, and Caroline Kubzansky, AB’21, recognized for investigating mass surveillance in China and ‘Operation Midway Blitz’
title_cn: UChicago alumni earn Pulitzer Prizes for international and local reporting
